calendar.matters:
Report Of Sale And Petition For Order Confirming Sale Of Real Property
Off Calendar Jun-13-2017 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: Cases PTR-17-300859 and PTR-17-300889 are related and were heard together.
Appearances: Ernest F. Der, for and with petitioner Debra Dolch.

Cause comes on for sale of real property located at 10430 Coloma Road, Rancho Cordova, California. The opening bid was in the amount of $5,750,000.00, which the Court found was a qualifying bid. There were no overbidders. The sale was confirmed at $5,750,000.00 based on the terms and conditions as set forth in the report of sale filed May 10, 2017. The Court granted the Petition to Confirm Sale of Real Property, subject to review of the order. An additional bond in the amount of $4,150,000.00 is required.

Judge: Peter J. Busch. Clerk: Craig Blackstone. Bailiff: Deputy Jaime. (Not reported)
